extortion.description: Plast-O-Matic Valves, Inc. specializes in the development and manufacturing of high-quality thermoplastic valves and controls for various industries, including agriculture, chemical processing, wastewater treatment, and semiconductor applications.We are ready to upload 51gb of corporate documents. Employees personal documents (DLs and others), lots of HR forms, clients information, financial and accounting data, NDAs, etc.
